items.title: What spring storylines for Notre Dame Football will be overrated in the fall?

items.title: Halfway through spring football, Notre Dame is putting things together
items.summary: Yes, it’s been a pretty quiet first half of the spring practice season for the Notre Dame Fighting Irish.
